# Contributing

1. Fork the repository.
2. Create a feature branch.
3. Make your changes. Ensure no emojis are added.
4. Update documentation in `docs/` if needed.
5. Submit a pull request using the template.

## Code Style

- Clean, minimal interface design.
- No decorative characters in code or UI labels.
- Dark theme uses `#121212`; light uses `#ffffff`.
